calendar.matters:
MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
Off Calendar Dec-05-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances

Thomas Koster Esq., Koster & Leadbetter LLP, 415-572-5015 via zoom for petitioner
Nicholas Muscolino Esq., Burke, Williams & Sorensen, LLP via zoom for respondent

Mr. Muscolino contests the tentative. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER DAVE O'DONNELL, PATRICIA GILLESPIE AMENDED MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD is GRANTED. No opposition on the merits on file. Prevailing party to prepare an order and judgment and submit the documents for execution on January 16, 2025 unless the parties reach a resolution/payment is made as referenced in the response.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)
